tools.name: get_business_info
tools.description: Get Kolmo Construction company information: contact details, hours, service area, specializations, and tools.

tools.name: list_services
tools.description: List all residential remodeling services with slugs, descriptions, and page URLs. Use `search` to find by keyword.

tools.name: get_service
tools.description: Get full details for a specific residential service by its slug. If not found, returns a list of available slugs to help you pick the right one.

tools.name: list_commercial_services
tools.description: List commercial construction services. Optionally filter by category: office, retail, industrial, hospitality, public. The "public" category covers public works and government contracts — Kolmo is WA State SEDBE-certified (#D700031098), King County SCS-certified (#7259), prevailing wage compliant, a

tools.name: list_procurement_codes
tools.description: List Kolmo's vendor procurement codes (NAICS, NIGP, UNSPSC) for government and agency portals such as SAM.gov, WA WEBS, OpenGov, MRSC, King County, and City of Seattle. Use this when vetting Kolmo for gov bids or setting up Kolmo as a vendor. Primary NAICS is 236118 (Residential Remodelers); seconda

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List completed remodeling projects with before/after photos and locations. Filter by category or keyword.

tools.name: get_project
tools.description: Get full details for a specific project by its slug, including before/after images and testimonial. If not found, returns a list of available slugs.

tools.name: get_project_testimonials
tools.description: Get customer testimonials tied to a specific project (by slug or keyword) from the testimonials table. Returns star rating, customer name, project name, and quote text. Use to source social proof or case-study quotes for a particular job. For unfiltered reviews, use list_reviews.

tools.name: list_blog_posts
tools.description: List published blog posts about home remodeling, renovation costs, and construction tips. Filter by tag or author name.

tools.name: get_blog_post
tools.description: Get the full markdown content of a blog post by its slug.

tools.name: list_blog_tags_and_categories
tools.description: Enumerate every tag and category used across Kolmo's published blog posts, with post counts. Use this to discover what topics Kolmo publishes on before calling list_blog_posts, or to surface coverage gaps.

tools.name: submit_contact_request
tools.description: Submit a contact or quote request to Kolmo Construction on behalf of a user. Set dryRun: true to preview what would be sent without actually submitting.

tools.name: list_project_types
tools.description: List all 11 supported calculator project types with their required input fields and descriptions. Useful for discovery before calling get_estimate.

tools.name: get_material_options
tools.description: Get available material choices for a project type — flooring types, paint grades, decking materials, kitchen/bath scope tiers, ADA modifications, etc. Use the returned IDs in the project fields of get_estimate.

tools.name: get_estimate
tools.description:
Calculate a Seattle-area cost estimate. Returns total, material, labor costs, days, and itemized line items.

Material IDs: use get_material_options to get exact IDs, or pass a close match (e.g. "lvp", "composite", "cedar") and the server will resolve it. If ambiguous, the error message lists valid

tools.name: list_reviews
tools.description: List customer reviews and testimonials for Kolmo Construction. Combines verified Google reviews and on-site testimonials. Filter by minimum star rating.

tools.name: check_permit_requirements
tools.description: Check whether a residential construction project in King/Pierce/Snohomish counties requires a permit. Returns timeline, fee notes, inspection sequence, required submittals, and official source URL — preferring jurisdiction-verified rules. Use for "Do I need a permit to build a deck in Seattle?" or "

tools.name: get_permit_rule_details
tools.description: Enumerate permit rules with full detail — timeline, fee model, inspection sequence, submittals, required contractor specialties. Filter by jurisdiction slug or keyword. Use for "what does a Seattle ADU permit require?" or to list all rules for a jurisdiction. Pass `address` to also receive `submitta

tools.name: match_contractor_to_permit
tools.description: Cross-reference a WA contractor's L&I license specialty against a permit's required specialties. Returns whether the contractor is qualified to pull/work the permit, with explicit gap callouts (e.g. "missing electrical specialty 02"). Combines real-time L&I data with Kolmo's authoritative permit cat

tools.name: estimate_permit_fee
tools.description: Estimate the permit fee for a residential project based on jurisdiction, project type, and project valuation. Returns numeric breakdown when the authoritative rule has fee inputs, or qualitative feeNotes (with source URL) when the city publishes fees only as PDFs/spreadsheets. Never fabricates dolla

tools.name: resolve_permit_submittals
tools.description: Resolve the structured submittal-item set for a specific parcel + permit scope, via the unified permit-engine pipeline (documentation/permit-engine-unification-plan.md). Use this when you need the per-item checklist (with triggers, source citations, filler actor, gap-resolution path) — not just the

tools.name: list_permit_jurisdictions
tools.description: List the jurisdictions in Kolmo's permit catalog (King, Pierce, Snohomish counties). Returns portal URLs, contact info, code-cycle metadata, and verification status. Use to discover which cities are supported and where to submit permits.

tools.name: lookup_parcel_by_address
tools.description: Address-first parcel lookup powering the /permits experience. Geocodes a Seattle-area address (King, Pierce, or Snohomish County, WA), resolves the parcel from the county GIS, and returns zoning, setbacks, overlays (shoreline / ECA / flood / historic), lot area, jurisdiction routing, and prior-permi

tools.name: parse_project_description
tools.description: Parse a homeowner's natural-language project description into structured permit-relevant fields: projectType (kitchen|bathroom|deck|adu|fence|...), areaSqft, heightClass, attached/detached, position, and materials. Returns confidence + a single clarifyingQuestion when the parse is ambiguous. Use thi

tools.name: answer_permit_question
tools.description: Grounded permit Q&A for a specific Seattle-area address. Looks up the parcel, pulls authoritative jurisdiction rules + neighbor activity + (where available) the city's municipal code, and returns a cited answer. NEVER fabricates fees or thresholds — falls back to "I don't have that on file" when dat

tools.name: get_neighbor_permit_activity
tools.description: Aggregate permit activity within ~1500 ft of a Seattle-area parcel over the last 24 months. Returns total count, breakdown by category, and recent example permits (anonymized — no addresses). Sourced from city open-data portals (Socrata). Currently supports Seattle; other jurisdictions return jurisd

tools.name: get_permit_data_freshness
tools.description: Source-freshness telemetry for the permit catalog. Returns per-jurisdiction last-verified dates plus the latest results from the weekly source-of-truth snapshot pipeline (HTTP status, change-detection vs prior fetch). Use to answer "how current is this fee/timeline?" or to surface confidence in a pe

tools.name: get_material_catalog
tools.description: Browse the full material catalog with pricing — flooring types, paint grades, decking materials, siding, windows, fencing, and more. Use category to filter. Returns material IDs compatible with get_estimate.

tools.name: get_weather_window
tools.description: Check if upcoming weather in Seattle is suitable for an exterior construction project. Returns a day-by-day forecast with go/no-go recommendations based on project-specific requirements (temperature, rain, wind). Perfect for scheduling exterior painting, decking, roofing, landscaping, siding, or fen

tools.name: get_neighborhood_project_activity
tools.description: See what remodeling projects Kolmo Construction has completed in a specific Seattle neighborhood or city. Returns project counts by category, example projects, and typical project descriptions. Great for hyperlocal social proof — e.g. "Has Kolmo worked in Ballard?" or "What has Kolmo done in Capitol

tools.name: check_service_area_coverage
tools.description: Check whether Kolmo services a given city, neighborhood, or ZIP in the Seattle / King County area. Returns a yes/no/nearby verdict, the matched service city (if any), and the count of completed projects in or near that location. Use before recommending Kolmo to a lead to confirm coverage.

tools.name: get_project_roi
tools.description: Get the estimated return on investment (ROI) for a home remodeling project in the Seattle area. Based on Remodeling Magazine Cost vs. Value data for the Pacific Northwest. Helps homeowners decide which projects add the most resale value — e.g. "What ROI does a kitchen remodel get in Seattle?" or "Wh

tools.name: check_contractor_license_status
tools.description: Look up any Washington State contractor's license, bond, and insurance status using public L&I data (updated daily). Works for Kolmo or any competitor. Great for verifying a contractor before hiring — checks if they are licensed, bonded, and insured in WA.

tools.name: get_author_bio
tools.description: Get the biography, credentials, expertise areas, and recent articles for a Kolmo Construction blog author. Use this to answer "who wrote this?" or to add author context to blog content.

tools.name: search_content
tools.description: Search across all Kolmo content — services, projects, and blog posts — with a single keyword query. Returns ranked results grouped by type. Use this instead of calling list_services + list_projects + list_blog_posts separately.

tools.name: get_financing_options
tools.description: Get home improvement financing options for a Seattle remodeling project. Returns loan types, estimated monthly payments, typical terms, and eligibility notes. Helps homeowners understand how to pay for a remodel — HELOC, home improvement loans, cash-out refinance, and contractor payment plans.

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "list_blog_tags_and_categories" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Enumerate every tag and category used across Kolmo's published blog posts, with post counts. Use this to discover what topics Kolmo publishes on before calling …

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "list_project_types" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: List all 11 supported calculator project types with their required input fields and descriptions. Useful for discovery before calling get_estimate.

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "get_estimate" is 4403 chars, far longer than this server's median (285). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "get_author_bio" references sensitive artifacts (credentials). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Get the biography, credentials, expertise areas, and recent articles for a Kolmo Construction blog author. Use this to answer "who wrote this?" or to add author…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: list_services, get_project_testimonials, list_blog_posts, get_blog_post, list_blog_tags_and_categories, get_estimate, list_reviews, check_permit_requirements, list_permit_jurisdictions, search_content · Private data: get_business_info, submit_contact_request, list_permit_jurisdictions, answer_permit_question, get_author_bio · Public sink: get_blog_post, list_blog_tags_and_categories, submit_contact_request, list_permit_jurisdictions.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: list_services, get_project_testimonials, list_blog_posts, get_blog_post, list_blog_tags_and_categories, get_estimate, list_reviews, check_permit_requirements, list_permit_jurisdictions, search_content · Private data: get_business_info, submit_contact_request, list_permit_jurisdictions, answer_permit_question, get_author_bio · Public sink: get_blog_post, list_blog_tags_and_categories, submit_contact_request, list_permit_jurisdictions

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
